title: Introducing Jupiter Card: a fully integrated onchain card inside Jupiter Mobile

snippet: Jupiter (@JupiterExchange): Introducing Jupiter Card: a fully integrated onchain card inside Jupiter Mobile. Built natively into Jupiter Mobile, use your wallet balance for spending: ✅Spend wherever Visa is accepted ✅Visa Infinite and Platinum virtual cards ✅1-1.8% FX on Card Spend ✅Funded by USDC,…
